title: Privacy Policy | Vetino Pet Care & Transportation
description: Read Vetino's Privacy Policy to learn how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal and pet information when using our pet care and transportation services.

value.heading: Privacy Policy
value.markdown:
**Last Updated:** June 2026

At Vetino, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and safeguard the information you provide when using our website and services.

By accessing our website or using our services, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

---

## Information We Collect

### Personal Information

When you contact us, book a service, or create an account, we may collect:

- Full name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Home address
- Emergency contact information
- Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)

### Pet Information

To provide quality care and transportation services, we may collect:

- Pet name
- Species and breed
- Age and weight
- Medical history
- Vaccination records
- Special care requirements
- Behavioral information

### Website Usage Information

We may automatically collect:

- IP address
- Browser type
- Device information
- Pages visited
- Session duration
- Cookies and analytics data

---

## How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

- Provide requested services
- Schedule appointments and transportation
- Communicate regarding bookings
- Process payments
- Improve our services and website
- Send important service updates
- Comply with legal obligations
- Ensure pet safety and well-being

---

## Cookies and Tracking Technologies

Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to:

- Improve website performance
- Remember user preferences
- Analyze visitor behavior
- Enhance user experience

You can disable cookies through your browser settings, though some website features may not function properly.

---

## Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

We may share information with:

- Veterinary clinics when necessary for appointments
- Grooming or care providers involved in booked services
- Payment processing providers
- Legal authorities when required by law

All third-party partners are expected to handle your information responsibly and securely.

---

## Data Security

We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

While we strive to protect your data, no method of electronic transmission or storage is completely secure.

---

## Data Retention

We retain personal and pet-related information only for as long as necessary to:

- Deliver services
- Maintain records
- Meet legal and regulatory obligations
- Resolve disputes and enforce agreements

---

## Your Privacy Rights

Depending on your location and applicable laws, you may have the right to:

- Access your personal information
- Correct inaccurate information
- Request deletion of your data
- Restrict or object to certain processing activities
- Request a copy of your data

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the information below.

---

## Children's Privacy

Our services are intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age required by applicable law.

---

## Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of third-party websites.

---

## Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be posted on this page along with the updated revision date.

---

## Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact us.

**Vetino**

- Email: contact@vetino.com
- Phone: +385 XX XXX XXXX
- Address: Zagreb, Croatia
